title: Renault service goes extra mile
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - "If you drive a Renault, we've got your back." That's the promise from Dealer Principal Dawie Roux and Sales Manager Kurt Johnson of Tavcor Renault George.


> At Tavcor Renault George, customer convenience and quality service come standard.


The team offers a complete motoring experience, combining personal care with the latest technology. From pick-up and drop-off services for deliveries and maintenance to remote purchasing and finance options, customers can complete their entire transaction from deal to delivery without leaving home.

Their dealership is well stocked with new and pre-owned vehicles to suit every lifestyle. "Whether you're a mum with three children, a student or someone who loves the outdoors, we have something for you," says Johnson.

There's plenty to get excited about on the showroom floor.


> The new Renault Kwid, launching at the end of November from just R178 799, offers big features in a compact, affordable package.


The versatile Triber and rugged new Duster are also ready to impress.

As the only Renault dealership between Worcester and Gqeberha, Tavcor Renault George is proud to serve customers across the region.

With a planned revamp product range, they're entering an exciting new era. Between Johnson and his three colleagues, the team boasts 82 years of combined experience, guided by integrity, honesty and a people-first approach.

Their dedication extends far beyond the showroom. Through soup kitchens, school fundraisers and stationery drives, staff members regularly roll up their sleeves to make a difference in the community that supports them.

With access to over 700 vehicles via heytavcor.co.za and a service department qualified to work on almost any vehicle, Tavcor Renault George truly has your back every kilometre of the way.

Visit them at 24 CJ Langenhoven Street, or contact them on 044 873 2039.

Operating hours

• Mon - Fri: 07:45 - 17:15

• Sat: 09:00 - 12:30

• Closed on Sundays and public holidays.

Photo: Kristy Kolberg

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
